{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Rune-lights
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Rune-lights]] are usually many different colors.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
